chosen_action.title: Filter recently contacted publisher targets out of the latest primary-repo-flat discovery artifact

why_this_action.summary: The latest discovery artifact still listed AXME Code, WyeWorks, and Bollwerk / Werkstatt as contact-ready even though live publisher outreach already shipped in the current 7-day review window. That stale presentation could push future runs back toward duplicate follow-through while the execution board was already warning against it.

runtime_send_attempt.reason: Cross-context messaging denied: provider telegram while bound to matrix

expected_outcome: Future primary-repo-flat follow-through sees only the untouched ctxt.dev / Signum target in the latest discovery artifact instead of resurfacing already-contacted publishers as if they were fresh.

measurement_window.success_metric: primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery_latest.{json,md} continues to omit AXME Code, WyeWorks, and Bollwerk / Werkstatt while their active outreach windows are still live, leaving ctxt.dev / Signum as the only untouched target in this repair set.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If a later run re-surfaces already-contacted publishers as contact-ready without a new window or a new untouched target set, extend the same truthfulness filter to the downstream packet/board generator too.
